name: ekoindia
description: Eko Platform Services (EPS) plugins — dev-time API context + integration skills, and runtime verification APIs (PAN, Aadhaar, bank, GSTIN) as MCP tools.

plugins.name: eps
plugins.description: For coding agents at dev time — EPS API context MCP, integration skills, and the /eps command. No credentials needed.

plugins.name: eps-transact
plugins.description: For AI agents at runtime — every EPS verification API (PAN, Aadhaar, bank, GSTIN, …) as an MCP tool, executed with your own credentials.
